detail.instructions: Change FileRead to the tuple variant FileRead(#[from] std::io::Error). Let thiserror derive both Error::source and From<std::io::Error>.

hints.body: Use #[from] when conversion is mechanical and loses no semantic information.
A #[from] field is also treated as the source.
No handwritten From implementation is needed.

detail.completionExplanation: I/O failures now convert with ? through a derived From implementation while retaining their source chain.
